content.json:
# Tailscale Operations (Premium)

Full security and operational view across the **Tailscale Premium (CCF)** data connector — covers configuration audit (`Tailscale_Configuration_CL`) **and** network flow (`Tailscale_Network_CL`) telemetry.

For Personal (Free) / Standard tier tailnets, use the **Tailscale Operations (Standard)** workbook instead.

content.title: Configuration audit summary

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize EventCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Action
| render timechart
content.title: Configuration activity over time, by action

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName)
| where isnotempty(ActorLogin)
| summarize EventCount = count() by ActorLogin
| top 10 by EventCount
| render barchart
content.title: Top 10 actors

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize EventCount = count() by tostring(Target.type)
| top 10 by EventCount
| render piechart
content.title: Target type distribution

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName), TargetType = tostring(Target.type)
| summarize EventCount = count() by ActorLogin, Action, TargetType
| order by EventCount desc
content.title: Actor / Action / Target heatmap

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where tostring(Target.type) == "ACL"
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName)
| project TimeGenerated, ActorLogin, Action, OldPolicy = Old, NewPolicy = New
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: ACL policy change history

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where tostring(Target.type) == "AUTH_KEY"
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName), Reusable = tostring(New.reusable), Ephemeral = tostring(New.ephemeral)
| project TimeGenerated, Action, ActorLogin, KeyId = tostring(Target.id), Reusable, Ephemeral, Description = tostring(New.description)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Auth key lifecycle

content.query:
Tailscale_Configuration_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where tostring(Target.type) in ("API_KEY", "OAUTH_CLIENT")
| extend ActorLogin = tostring(Actor.loginName)
| project TimeGenerated, Action, ActorLogin, Type = tostring(Target.type), TargetId = tostring(Target.id), Description = tostring(New.description)
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: API token and OAuth client activity

content.json:
## Network Flows (Premium)

These visualisations require the `Tailscale Premium (CCF)` data connector. If no data is shown, install the Premium connector or confirm your tailnet is on the Premium or Enterprise tier.

content.title: Network flow summary

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| mv-expand t = VirtualTraffic
| extend Src = tostring(t.src), Dst = tostring(t.dst), TxBytes = tolong(t.txBytes), RxBytes = tolong(t.rxBytes)
| summarize TotalBytes = sum(TxBytes + RxBytes) by Src, Dst
| top 20 by TotalBytes
| render barchart
content.title: Top 20 talkers (virtual traffic, bytes)

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where array_length(ExitTraffic) > 0
| mv-expand t = ExitTraffic
| extend ExitDst = tostring(t.dst), Bytes = tolong(t.txBytes) + tolong(t.rxBytes)
| summarize TotalBytes = sum(Bytes), Flows = count() by SrcNodeName = tostring(SrcNode.name), ExitDst
| top 50 by TotalBytes
content.title: Exit-node traffic

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where array_length(SubnetTraffic) > 0
| mv-expand t = SubnetTraffic
| extend Bytes = tolong(t.txBytes) + tolong(t.rxBytes)
| summarize TotalBytes = sum(Bytes), Flows = count() by SrcNodeName = tostring(SrcNode.name)
| top 25 by TotalBytes
content.title: Subnet router throughput by source node

content.query:
Tailscale_Network_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| mv-expand t = VirtualTraffic
| extend Bytes = tolong(t.txBytes) + tolong(t.rxBytes)
| summarize TotalBytes = sum(Bytes) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| render timechart
content.title: Virtual-traffic bytes over time

content.json:
## Security Signals

Incidents and alerts raised by Tailscale-related analytic rules.

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertName startswith "Tailscale"
| summarize Count = count() by AlertName, AlertSeverity
| order by Count desc
content.title: Tailscale alerts by rule

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertName startswith "Tailscale"
| summarize Count = count() by AlertSeverity
| render piechart
content.title: Severity distribution

content.query:
SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where AlertName startswith "Tailscale"
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, Description, Entities
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Recent Tailscale alerts
